story: Fresh Lionel Messi locker-room clip sparks wild World Cup final theory: ‘Was something already off?’ | Football News
title: What's Wrong with Messi's Body Language?
script:
Lionel Messi's future with the Miami team is already in doubt after just two games on hiatus.
A shocking new video has emerged of Messi in tears after Argentina's World Cup loss to Spain.
The clip, from the locker room, is sparking intense speculation that something was already off with Messi's mental state before the loss.
Sources reveal that both Messi and teammate De Paul will take a break from the Miami team for the next two games, fueling concerns about Messi's commitment.
This comes as Messi himself admits it will take time to heal from the World Cup wound, leaving fans wondering if he'll ever be the same on the pitch.
Is this the end of an era for the soccer legend?
